Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Is ICJ still available online?

Tech · asked by user [] · 2010-05-30 · 1 answers
Greetings.

Does anyone know whether the archives of ICJ can still be found somewhere on the internet?
My Google search hasnt revealed anything much, except a few scattered articles at other sites and a lot of dead links.
At the ISKCON News site, there is only a "page not found" notice for http://news.iskcon.org/icj/.
There is now the ISKCON Studies Journal - http://iskconstudies.org/iskcon-studies-journal-vol-one/.

Thank you.
user [38] · 2010-05-31
In archive.org, though incomplete. First 17 issues are also in Vedabase.
